reviews.review_description: There's a few bugs but other than that the game is awesome  There's horror there's three levels,level 1 you run around and find your way out. Level 2 you find two papers with two numbers on each and figure out what the password is with those two numbers. Level 3 there's 3 different rooms and in those rooms there's a chance that there's a key then you find the lock you put key in the lock and you finish horror. Then the slide rooms there's pvp you get a hammer to wack the other players, hangout there's a fun ball pit with a trampoline and some bean bags.theres also a pool with a slide and more bean bags. Don't forget about parkore if you fall you die in lava .and that just made capture the flag you have to get the other teams flag and bring it to your teams side. And you also have to have cosmetics there's sometimes a new bundle each update and of course there's basic cosmetics you get them by spending you bananas you get .you get 100 every day . And the community is awesome the people are super nice and I've made lots of friends.
This game has so much activity with so many things to do. The community is great and the devs are always dropping you updates join the discord if you haven’t. 🔥🔥🔥🔥
Super good game good cosemtics and mods and owner is active and there’s working horror and working pvp
Nothing I can say besides W
The owner is active a ton. Now the game is dry as of the time of this posting, but there is a update coming soon with a bunch of cool things!!!
This might be the best gorilla tag movement vr game Everyone is always so active and the game has a LOT of potential for the updates in it so definitely gotta be a 5 star

reviews.review_title: Really good game for being new
reviews.review_description: This game is fr one of the best games ive seen for being new, keep up the good work :)
